chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-665 of 2017 Muhammad Hassan Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on CMA 3505/17 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 21.04.2025 None present. -.-.- This is an old matter of 2017 which is over eight years ago. Even on the very inception of this petition none was present for the petitioner. On the last date of hearing i.e. 21.08.2020, which is also about five years ago, none was present on behalf of the petition when the matter was adjourned with a note of caution. We don’t see that the petitioner or his counsel has ever appeared before this Court despite lapse of eight years. Today also none is present for the petitioner. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
